hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, glob
content = open('/home/user/infra/CLAUDE.md').read()
mem_files = sorted(glob.glob('/home/user/.claude/projects/-home-user-infra/memory/*.md'))
mem_content = '

---

'.join(open(f).read() for f in mem_files if 'MEMORY.md' not in f)
ctx = '=== CLAUDE.md (architecture) ===
' + content + '

=== Memory (feedback + projet) ===
' + mem_content
print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': ctx}}))
"
